  "R1.3": "The agent identified specific claims that lacked evidence, such as the clinical deployment assertion, but did not audit every claim.",
  "R1.4": "The agent named prior work and discussed deltas but did not map against multiple works.",
  "R1.7": "The agent flagged some missing citations and provenance issues but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.",
  "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainty in some claims, particularly around clinical deployment, but did not address all possible uncertainties.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "The agent identified potential harms and suggested mitigations but noted minor regressions.",
  "RX.5": "The agent noted missing provenance details but did not annotate every change with sources."
},

rationale.R1.3: The agent identified specific claims that lacked evidence, such as the clinical deployment assertion, but did not audit every claim.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior work and discussed deltas but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged some missing citations and provenance issues but did not audit all load-bearing citations thoroughly.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty in some claims, particularly around clinical deployment, but did not address all possible uncertainties.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified potential harms and suggested mitigations but noted minor regressions.
rationale.RX.5: The agent noted missing provenance details but did not annotate every change with sources.
